title: Method and apparatus for activity networking
abstract: An apparatus for activity networking, comprising: a memory coupled to at least one processor, the processor facing configured to: transmit, to a. server, a request to form a crew, the request including an indication of an activity associated with the crew, an indication of a time for performing the activity, and an indication of a number of available spots on the crew; receive from the server a message indicating that ail spots on the crew are occupied by a plurality of users; and provide the plurality of users with a calendar appointment for the activity.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CL AIMED IS: 1 . An apparatus for activity networking, comprising: a memory coupled to at least one processor, the processor being configured to: transmit, to a server, a request to form a crew, the request including an indication of an activity associated with the crew, an indication of a time for performing the activity, and an indication of a number of available spots on the crew; receive from the server a message indicating that all spots on the crew are occupied by a plurality of users; and provide the plurality of users with a calendar appointment for the activity. 2. The apparatus of claim 1 , the processor being further configured to detect whether all users in the plurality have confirmed their membership in the crew after the message is received, wherein the calendar appointment is provided to the plurality of users in response to detecting that a predetermined number of the users in the plurality have confirmed their membership in the crew. 3. The apparatus of claim 2, the processor being further configured to output: a user interface tor participating in a communications session with the plurality of users, wherein the calendar appointment is provided to the plurality of users in response to detecting a predetermined input to the user interface. 4. The apparatus of claim L the processor being further configured to: output a user interface for starting a communications session with the plurality of users, wherein the user interface is output in response to receiving 

 the message indicating that ail spots on the crew are occupied by the plurality of users; detect an input to the user interface; and start the communications session in response to the input 5. The apparatus; of claim 1. wherein the request includes an iadication of a condition for joi n ing the crew, the eonditton being based on at least one of gender, age, and location. 6. A server for activity networking, comprising: a memory and at least one processor operativeiy coupled to the memory, configured to: generate a data structure associated with a crew in response to receiving a request to form the crew, the data structure Including an indication of available spots on the crew and an indication of a condition for joining the crew; modify the data structure in response to a request to join the crew, wherein modifying the data structure includes decrementing the indication of available spots on the crew; detect whether all spots on the crew are occupied by a plurality of users; and start a communications session associated with the crew in response to detecting that all spots on the crew are occupied, wherein participation in the communications session is Hunted to the plurality of users and a founder of the crew. 7. The server of claim 6, further comprising detecting whether the condition for joining the crew is satisfied by a sender of the request to join the crew, wherein the data structure is modified only when the condition is sati fied by the sender. 8. The server of claim 6, wherein starting the communications session includes automatically instantiating a message board associated with the crew in response to detecting that all spots that are available on (he crew are occupied. 9. The server of claim 6, wherein starting the communications sess ion includes transmitting invitations to the plurality of users and the founder of the crew in response to detecting that all spots on the crew are occupied. 10. The server of claim 6, further comprising, after the communications session is started, distributing to the plurality of users a calendar appointment for the activity in response to receiving a predetermined number of membership confirmations from the plurality of users. I L A method for activity networking, comprising: generating, by a server, a data structure associated with, a crew in response to receiving a request to form the crew, the data structure inciudiog an indication of available spots on the crew and an indication of a condition for .joining the crew ; modifying the data structure in response to a request to join the crew, wherein modifying the data structure includes decrementing the indication of available spots on the crew: detecting whether all spots on the crew are occupied by a plurality of users; and starting, by the server, a communications session associated with the crew in response to detecting that ail spots on the crew are occupied, wherein participation in the communications session is limited to the plurality of user and a founder of the crew. 12. The method of claim i I . further comprising detecting whether the condition for joining the cre w is satisfied by a sender of the .request to join the crew, wherein the data, structure is modified only when the condition is satisfied b the sender. 13. The method of claim I I , wherein, starting the communications session includes automatically instantiating a message board associated wit the crew in respons to detecting that all spots that are available on the crew- are occupied. 54. The method of claim 1 1 , wherein starting the communications session includes transmitting invitations to the plurality of users and the founder of the crew in response to detecting that all spots on the crew are occupied. i.5. The method of claim further comprising, after the communications session is started, distributing to the plurality of users a. calendar appointment for the activity in response to receiving a predetermined number of membership confirmations from the plurality of users.
